title: Zorbit Privilege Registry
description: Central registry of all platform privileges. Services must register their privileges here. Authorization service enforces these.

privileges.description: Read access to user accounts within the scoped namespace.
Create and update user accounts within the scoped namespace.
Soft-delete user accounts within the scoped namespace.
View active sessions within the scoped namespace.
Create and terminate sessions. Typically granted to the identity service itself.
Full administrative access across all platform services. Reserved for platform operators.
